CREATE TABLE "AspNetUsers" (

    "Id" INTEGER NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_Categories" PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    "Name" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "Slug" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "Description" TEXT NULL,
    "IsActive" INTEGER NOT NULL
);

    "Id" TEXT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_OpenIddictApplications" PRIMARY KEY,

    "ConcurrencyToken" TEXT NULL,
    "Description" TEXT NULL,
    "Descriptions" TEXT NULL,
    "DisplayName" TEXT NULL,
    "DisplayNames" TEXT NULL,

);

CREATE TABLE "AspNetUserClaims" (
    "Id" INTEGER NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_AspNetUserClaims" PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    "UserId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "ClaimType" TEXT NULL,
    "ClaimValue" TEXT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "FK_AspNetUserClaims_AspNetUsers_UserId" FOREIGN KEY ("UserId") REFERENCES "AspNetUsers" ("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE "AspNetUserLogins" (
    "LoginProvider" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "ProviderKey" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "ProviderDisplayName" TEXT NULL,
    "UserId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_AspNetUserLogins" PRIMARY KEY ("LoginProvider", "ProviderKey"),
    CONSTRAINT "FK_AspNetUserLogins_AspNetUsers_UserId" FOREIGN KEY ("UserId") REFERENCES "AspNetUsers" ("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE "AspNetUserRoles" (
    "UserId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "RoleId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_AspNetUserRoles" PRIMARY KEY ("UserId", "RoleId"),
    CONSTRAINT "FK_AspNetUserRoles_AspNetRoles_RoleId" FOREIGN KEY ("RoleId") REFERENCES "AspNetRoles" ("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE,

);

    "Value" TEXT NULL,

    CONSTRAINT "FK_AspNetUserTokens_AspNetUsers_UserId" FOREIGN KEY ("UserId") REFERENCES "AspNetUsers" ("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);

    "Id" INTEGER NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_Websites" PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,

    "IsActive" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "CategoryId" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "display_name" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "Domain" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "url_sample" TEXT NULL,

);

    "Id" TEXT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_OpenIddictAuthorizations" PRIMARY KEY,

    "Properties" TEXT NULL,
    "Scopes" TEXT NULL,
    "Status" TEXT NULL,
    "Subject" TEXT NULL,

);

CREATE TABLE "CredibilitySnapshots" (
    "Id" INTEGER NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_CredibilitySnapshots" PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,

    "Id" INTEGER NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_Ratings" PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,

    "BiasNeutrality" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "Transparency" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "SafetyTrust" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "Comment" TEXT NULL,
    "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "UpdatedAt" TEXT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "FK_Ratings_Websites_WebsiteId" FOREIGN KEY ("WebsiteId") REFERENCES "Websites" ("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE "OpenIddictTokens" (
    "Id" TEXT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_OpenIddictTokens" PRIMARY KEY,
    "ApplicationId" TEXT NULL,
    "AuthorizationId" TEXT NULL,
    "ConcurrencyToken" TEXT NULL,
    "CreationDate" TEXT NULL,
    "ExpirationDate" TEXT NULL,
    "Payload" TEXT NULL,
    "Properties" TEXT NULL,

);
